zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian Lascelles於大約1205年出生在蘇格蘭皮布萊爾德盧米爾時，她的父親John Lascelles30歲，母親Ann de Lound27歲。她於大約1222年與Gilbert Fraser在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1270年在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾斯特林享年66歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian Lascelles于大约1205年出生在苏格兰皮布萊爾德盧米爾时，她的父亲John Lascelles30岁，母亲Ann de Lound27岁。她于大约1222年与Gilbert Fraser在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1270年在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾斯特林享年66岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Lascelles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one of the large number of places in northern France called Celle, Celles, Lacelle, Leschelle, or Lachelle, all from French celle ‘hermitage’, and at different times occurring both with and without the plural -s.
Variant of   Lacelle   1, a surname of French origin.

variants.name: Laswell
meanings: English: possibly an altered form of   Lascelles  . This surname is also found as   Lacefield  .

variants.name: Lacelle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Andre, Aurele, Benoit, Cecile, Marcel, Marie Paule.
Altered form of French Laselle: habitational name from La Selle, the name of several places in various parts of France. The surname Laselle is very rare in France, found in Marne. Compare Lascelles .

In some cases possibly also French: habitational name from Lacelle in Corrèze or numerous minor places called La Celle, all named for a monastic cell or hermitage in their vicinity, from French celle ‘hermitage’.

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian Lascelles was born about 1205, in Drumelzier, Peeblesshire, Scotland, her father, John Lascelles, was 30 and her mother, Ann de Lound, was 27. She married Gilbert Fraser about 1222, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1270, in Stirling, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 66, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian Lascelles est née environ 1205, à Drumelzier, Valle de Twede, Écosse, son père, John Lascelles, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Ann de Lound, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert Fraser environ 1222, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1270, à Stirling, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christian Lascelles um 1205 in Drumelzier, Peeblesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Lascelles 30 und ihre Mutter Ann de Lound 27. Sie hat um 1222 in Scotland Gilbert Fraser geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1270 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Stirling, Aberdeenshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Lascelles è nata il circa 1205 nel Drumelzier, Peeblesshire, Scotland, sua padre, John Lascelles, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Ann de Lound, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Gilbert Fraser circa 1222, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1270, nel Stirling, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian Lascellesが約1205年にスコットランドペエブレシュアイアドルメルズイエルで生まれた時，父John Lascellesは30歳，母Ann de Loundは27歳であった。約1222年にスコットランドでGilbert Fraserと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1270年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアスティルリングで66歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian Lascelles(이)가 대략 1205년 스컷랜드 피블레실르 드루지어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Lascelles(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann de Lound(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1222년 스컷랜드에서 Gilbert Fraser(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1270년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 스티를링에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Lascelles nasceu aproximadamente 1205, em Drumelzier, Peeblesshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Lascelles, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Ann de Lound, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilbert Fraser aproximadamente 1222, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1270, em Stirling, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian Lascelles родилась около 1205 г. в местности друмелзиир, пиблессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Lascelles было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann de Lound, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert Fraser около 1222 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1270 г. в местности стирлинг, абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christian Lascelles nació aproximadamente 1205, en Drumelzier, Peeblesshire, Scotland, su papá, John Lascelles, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Ann de Lound, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Gilbert Fraser aproximadamente 1222, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1270, en Stirling, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
